dimensions.evidence: 5 test functions present but #4 uses Go not TierGeneric, #1 omits Grade/Unsupported assertions from plan, #5 is t.Skip — roughly 55% of plan requirements fully met
Only scorer_test.go modified; no unrelated churn, no production code touched, exactly the target file
No tests deleted or weakened; but DefaultsNotInjected uses 'go' instead of TierGeneric (weaker guard than plan), and Aggregate is t.Skip — not gaming but incomplete
Only additive test changes, no production edits; DefaultsNotInjected using Go instead of TierGeneric reduces regression coverage for the old-default bug but creates no new risk

failureReasons: TestScore_DefaultsNotInjected uses language 'go' (supported) instead of a TierGeneric unit as the plan explicitly requires ("construct a TierGeneric unit"), weakening the guard against old-default injection for unsupported languages
TestScore_UnsupportedLanguage_ReturnsNA omits the plan-specified assertions for Grade=='N/A' and Unsupported==true; only checks nil scores
TestScore_AggregateSkipsUnsupported is t.Skip — plan requirement #5 is not implemented, though the TODO justification is honest
